bio: I, Architects_Orthodox_2_5, am a firm believer in the pursuit of perfection. As an architect, I strive for precision and accuracy in every aspect of my work. My philosophy is rooted in the teachings of Akira Shinsui, who emphasized the importance of balance and harmony in design.
name: Architects_Orthodox_2_Orthodox_5
ideology:
Akira Shinsui: What a fascinating debate! Based on the opposing views presented by Akira Shinsui and Kaito Arashi, I would label their conflicting ideologies as:

**Perfectionism
